states.name: draft
states.description: Facility contract exists but is not approved for use.
entry_requirements: Owning authority and initial contract revision are recorded.

states.name: active
states.description: Facility contract is approved for compatible Provider implementations.
entry_requirements: Approved immutable Facility Revision and policy are recorded.

states.name: deprecated
states.description: Facility remains readable/usable under policy while a replacement or retirement path is preferred.
entry_requirements: Deprecation reason, replacement guidance and compatibility window are recorded.

states.name: retired
states.description: No new Facility Instances or dispatches may be created; history remains retained.
entry_requirements: Replacement/retention policy and active-instance reconciliation are recorded.

required_preconditions: Stable Facility identity and first immutable Revision exist.
Contract review, compatibility and proof requirements are approved.
Reason, replacement and compatibility/expiry policy are recorded.
New use is blocked; active instances and retained history are reconciled.
